raw_cv_text:
Yusuf Nilsson
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: yusuf.nilsson@outlook.com | LinkedIn: yusuf-nilsson | GitHub: YusufNilsson | https://yusufjoy.dev
EDUCATION
University of Waterloo | Bachelor of Computer Science (Co-op) 2021 - 2025
Achieved Dean's List honors with 3.8 GPA in core systems and database courses
Completed 3 industrial co-op terms at top-tier tech companies, gaining hands-on backend development experience
Queen Mary University of London | Summer Exchange - Distributed Systems Specialization Summer 2023
Studied advanced microservices architecture and cloud infrastructure patterns
Built 2 production-grade distributed system prototypes in Go and Rust
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Backend Engineering Intern Jan 2024 - Apr 2024
Optimized payment reconciliation pipeline to reduce processing latency by 38%, improving real-time reporting accuracy
for 2,000+ merchants
Designed and deployed 3 new REST API endpoints for subscription management, handling 5M+ daily requests with
99.95% uptime
Reduced database query execution time by 42% through strategic indexing and query optimization on PostgreSQL
Notion | Junior Backend Developer May 2023 - Aug 2023
Built real-time synchronization service using WebSockets and event streaming, decreasing client-server sync latency from
450ms to 120ms
Implemented Redis caching layer for frequently accessed database queries, reducing backend CPU usage by 31% and
cutting response times by 55%
Mentored 2 interns on TypeScript best practices and helped them ship 4 feature flags that improved product reliability
Datadog | Software Engineering Co-op Sep 2022 - Dec 2022
Engineered high-throughput log ingestion service in Go that processed 120M+ events daily with sub-100ms p99 latency
Debugged and fixed 12 production incidents related to metric aggregation, improving data consistency by 26%
Developed comprehensive integration tests that increased code coverage from 67% to 84% and caught 8 critical edge
cases
PROJECTS
AsyncCache | Go, Redis, gRPC, Docker Feb 2024 - Apr 2024
Built a distributed caching service supporting 50K+ concurrent connections with automatic invalidation, achieving 94%
cache hit rate
Implemented cache coherence protocol reducing stale data scenarios by 73% across multi-node deployments
PulseDB | Rust, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Tokio Nov 2023 - Jan 2024
Created time-series database engine handling 1M+ data points per second with 99.9% accuracy
Decreased memory footprint by 48% through columnar storage optimization and compression algorithms
ShardFlow | Python, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Prometheus Jul 2023 - Sep 2023
Developed database sharding middleware that horizontally scaled read operations by 340% without application
refactoring
Reduced query routing latency from 8ms to 1.2ms through consistent hashing optimization
MicroTrace | TypeScript, Node.js, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry Apr 2023 - Jun 2023
Engineered distributed tracing library for microservices, enabling engineers to identify performance bottlenecks 65%
faster
Reduced trace processing overhead from 12% to 2% of request latency through intelligent sampling
EventStorm | Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, Elasticsearch Dec 2022 - Feb 2023
Built event sourcing framework processing 200K+ domain events hourly with zero data loss guarantees
Achieved 99.99% event delivery reliability through idempotency tokens and retry logic
EXTRACURRICULAR
Waterloo Distributed Systems Club | Core Contributor & Workshop Lead 2022 - Present
Organized and led 8 technical workshops on Kafka, gRPC, and consensus algorithms for 150+ students
Grew community from 40 to 280+ active members through curated content and mentorship programs
Open Source Maintainer | Creator of go-fastcache library 2023 - Present
Published Go caching library with 2,400+ GitHub stars and 180+ community contributions
Reduced download bandwidth costs for users by 67% through compression innovations featured in Hacker News top 5
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, TypeScript, Rust, Java, SQL
Technologies – PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, gRPC, REST APIs, GraphQL, Docker, Kubernetes, Apache Spark
Tools – Git, GitHub, Datadog, New Relic, Prometheus, Grafana, CI/CD pipelines, Linux, VS Code
